2210420.name: Fantasy Grounds - Enter the Jungle
2210420.description:
ENTER THE JUNGLE

Enter the Jungle contains the following:
  • BACKGROUND: GUIDE - Your experience and training have endowed you with the skill to survive in the jungle.
  • SPELLS FOR THE THICK OF THINGS - Six spells tailored for the tropical forests of the world.
  • THINGS OF A MAGICAL NATURE - Eight new items for the wilds, ranging from the mundane to legendary - and an artifact with personality.
  • CREATURES OF THE FAR JUJU - Eleven powerful adversaries: denizens of the jungle, mortal and fey; and one from another plane of terror altogether.
  • ADVENTURE: THE SCEPTER OF THE FAN PALM - Put all these elements together with four full color maps and send your adventurers deep into the jungle to find the missing villagers and return the Jungle King's prized scepter.
Adapted for Fantasy Grounds by: Sandra Koch
Requires: The free Fantasy Grounds virtual tabletop (VTT) software and the included 5E Compatible ruleset.
Screenshots may differ from what you see in-game based on the extension and ruleset you have loaded.
